source_lessons.title: Prototype feedback must update both artifact and product logic
Project preferences need isolated versioned caches

skill_updates.lesson_title: Prototype feedback must update both artifact and product logic
skill_updates.principle: Style instructions and reference images should be converted into reusable prototype expression rules.
skill_updates.expected_behavior: The skill parses explicit user-provided style directives and keeps them scoped to the current project unless approved as reusable guidance.
skill_updates.verification_hint: Reference analysis output includes style directives and guardrails.

skill_updates.lesson_title: Prototype feedback must update both artifact and product logic
skill_updates.principle: Business-logic feedback from prototype review must update product flows.
skill_updates.expected_behavior: Prototype feedback is classified and business flow artifacts stay consistent with prototype changes.
skill_updates.verification_hint: A feedback item that adds a module appears in both product flow and prototype preview.

skill_updates.lesson_title: Prototype feedback must update both artifact and product logic
skill_updates.principle: Prototype iteration should apply user feedback by layer and keep artifacts synchronized.
skill_updates.expected_behavior: The skill classifies feedback as business logic, page structure, copy, visual style, or exception state.
skill_updates.verification_hint: Preview Markdown, image/SVG, and product-flow updates remain aligned.

skill_updates.lesson_title: Project preferences need isolated versioned caches
skill_updates.principle: Project preference memory must be isolated, versioned, resettable, clearable, and traceable.
skill_updates.expected_behavior: The skill manages project-only cache lifecycle and approved/candidate preference separation.
skill_updates.verification_hint: Preference cache checker passes and cleared caches are not reused.

approval_checklist: User approved implementing the project preference cache mechanism.
User approved applying the prototype Skill improvements learned from the preview iteration.
Harness and regression must pass after applying.
